display_title: Mt. Moon - Gold Dust Right Path
difficulty_note: Paired with the Rocket left-path battle. Gold Dust uses mineral and ground pressure to feel distinct from Rocket's cave-crime team.

player_side.story_support: Red covers the fossil table while Antman blocks Gold Dust from claiming the Helix signal.

opponent.intent: shows Gold Dust as a resource-control faction that treats fossils, minerals, and rare signals as property
